scripts.cloud:restart: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && test -n "$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "cd /opt/openclaw/app && sudo OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app OPENCLAW_DEPLOY_ROOT=/opt/openclaw bash ./scripts/restart-cloud.sh \"$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME\""'
scripts.cloud:rebuild: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && test -n "$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME" && bash ./scripts/sync-cloud-app.sh "$VM_NAME" "$PROJECT_ID" "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "cd /opt/openclaw/app && sudo OPENCLAW_APP_ROOT=/opt/openclaw/app OPENCLAW_DEPLOY_ROOT=/opt/openclaw bash ./scripts/rebuild-cloud.sh \"$OPENCLAW_SECRET_NAME\""'
scripts.cloud:ps: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "cd /opt/openclaw/app && sudo docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml ps"'
scripts.cloud:logs: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "cd /opt/openclaw/app && sudo docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml logs --tail=${TAIL_LINES:-200} openclaw-gateway"'
scripts.cloud:test:gmail:read: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "cd /opt/openclaw/app && sudo docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway gog gmail search \"newer_than:1d\" --account automation@example.com --plain"'
scripts.cloud:test:gmail:send: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "cd /opt/openclaw/app && sudo docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway bash -lc '\''printf \"Cloud Gmail send test\\n\" | gog gmail send --account automation@example.com --to ${GMAIL_TEST_TO:-user@example.com} --subject \"${GMAIL_TEST_SUBJECT:-Pip Cloud Gmail send test}\" --body-file=-'\''"'
scripts.cloud:test:digest: bash -lc 'test -n "$VM_NAME" && test -n "$PROJECT_ID" && test -n "$ZONE" && gcloud compute ssh "$VM_NAME" --project="$PROJECT_ID" --zone="$ZONE" --tunnel-through-iap --command "cd /opt/openclaw/app && sudo docker-compose --env-file config/docker.build.env -f docker/compose.cloud.yml exec -T openclaw-gateway openclaw agent --agent main --message '\''${DIGEST_MESSAGE:-Run pip-newsletter-digest now in test mode.}'\''"'
